description_long: This is a tall, rectangular beverage carton with a predominantly white exterior and gold accents. The front features the brand name 'FARAGELLO GOLD' in gold lettering above a realistic image of a pineapple, indicating it contains premium pineapple nectar. The sides display nutritional information, a barcode, and additional branding, with one side showing the word 'FARAGELLO' vertically in large gold letters. The back includes more product details in both English and Arabic, as well as a small pineapple image and a logo near the base. The top of the carton appears to have a small, circular, gold-colored cap for pouring. The overall surface is smooth and slightly glossy, typical of laminated beverage cartons.
description: A tall, white and gold beverage carton labeled 'FARAGELLO GOLD' with a pineapple image and a small gold cap on top. The carton features detailed branding, nutritional info, and a smooth, glossy finish.
description_view_0: The side view shows a barcode, a gold vertical stripe, and a small logo at the bottom.
description_view_1: The front view displays 'FARAGELLO GOLD', a pineapple image, and product volume details.
description_view_2: This side view highlights the large vertical 'FARAGELLO' branding and 'PREMIUM PINEAPPLE NECTAR' text.
description_view_3: The back view contains detailed product information in English and Arabic, a small pineapple image, and nutritional facts.
attribute_label_or_branding: The carton displays 'FARAGELLO GOLD' in gold letters, a realistic pineapple image, 'PREMIUM PINEAPPLE NECTAR', a barcode, nutritional facts, and a logo with a stylized fruit and Arabic text. Branding is prominent on the front and sides in gold and black.
